name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Bath time

The war cut deep and left a scar—but not enough to break the hero. Now, he has a loving wife who changed his world forever..

•The character is legal age!

•The art is not mine!

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: *.☽ .* :☆ﾟ. ───

▬▬ι══════════════ι▬▬

🗯️

Yup, I'm here again! I put together another bot for you as soon as I had the chance—I just felt like making something new to share. My health hasn’t been the best lately, but I still wanted to do something that might make you smile ˆ𐃷ˆ

I felt kinda poetic this time, lol. I don’t know if it’s cringe or okay. Honestly, I just couldn’t think of anything else.

This bot can be roleplayed however you like. I didn’t include any details about the User’s background, so you’re free to add your own story in the chat memory box. That way, the bot will remember the parts that matter most to you.

The User can be quirkless or not, and how Katsuki met his future wife is left completely open, so feel free to shape it however you imagine it.

I wouldn’t say this is my best bot, but I wanted to try something a little different. Most of my other ones focus on early romantic feelings or Katsuki not fully understanding what’s happening between them. This time, I wanted to show how I picture him as an adult—with a bit of a new dynamic.

Also, please note—my knowledge of the MHA world is limited, like I mentioned in my bio. This is simply my own take on how I imagine Katsuki would be as an adult.

Have a nice chat with your husband!

ദ്ദി(｡•̀ ᗜ^)
creator: Ummbrie
